title: [security] requests call missing timeout (Bandit B113)
body:
## Finding
Static analysis (Bandit B113) flagged HTTP requests made without a `timeout`, which can hang worker threads indefinitely and be abused for resource exhaustion.

## Acceptance criteria
- Add an explicit, sensible `timeout=` to the affected `requests.*` call(s).
- Add/extend a unit test asserting the call is made with a timeout.
- Bandit B113 no longer fires for the changed lines.

_Source: Bandit scan, rule B113 (request_without_timeout)._

title: [security] Weak hash (md5/sha1) without usedforsecurity=False (Bandit B324)
body:
## Finding
Bandit B324 flagged use of an insecure hash function (md5/sha1). Where the hash is non-cryptographic (e.g. cache keys), it must be marked `usedforsecurity=False`; where it is security-relevant, migrate to SHA-256.

## Acceptance criteria
- Annotate non-security hashes with `usedforsecurity=False`, or migrate security-relevant ones to a strong algorithm.
- Preserve existing behaviour (no key/format breakage) and add a test.
- Bandit B324 no longer fires.

_Source: Bandit scan, rule B324 (hashlib_insecure_functions)._

title: [security] yaml.load used without SafeLoader (Bandit B506)
body:
## Finding
Bandit B506 flagged `yaml.load()` without a safe loader, which can execute arbitrary objects during deserialization.

## Acceptance criteria
- Replace with `yaml.safe_load()` (or pass `Loader=yaml.SafeLoader`).
- Confirm no functional regression in the affected parsing path; add a test.
- Bandit B506 no longer fires.

_Source: Bandit scan, rule B506 (yaml_load)._

title: [dependency] Upgrade vulnerable transitive dependency and fix breakage
body:
## Finding
`pip-audit` reported a known vulnerability in a pinned dependency. A version bump alone may break call-sites that use the changed API — those must be fixed too.

## Acceptance criteria
- Bump the affected dependency to the first non-vulnerable release.
- Update any code/usages broken by the upgrade so the test suite passes.
- `pip-audit` no longer reports the advisory.

_Source: pip-audit dependency scan._

title: [code-quality] Replace broad except / add missing exception context
body:
## Finding
A bare/overly-broad `except:` swallows errors and hampers debugging.

## Acceptance criteria
- Narrow the exception type(s) and/or log with context; re-raise where appropriate.
- Add a test covering the error path.
- No change in happy-path behaviour.

_Source: lint / code-quality review._
